Part.Source: Event Start btnSincronizarCte.Visible = 0 retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWMANIFESTACAO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) retornaAutorizacao.Call('EXCLUIRMANIFESTACAO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &AutNivEXCLUIRMANIFESTACAO) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Tablepercent.Visible = false tbResult.Visible = false BaixaManual.LinkTarget = '_blank' BaixaManual.Link = Link('http://www.nfe.fazenda.gov.br/portal/consultaRecaptcha.aspx?tipoConsulta=resumo&tipoConteudo=d09fwabTnLk=') PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.Trim().IsEmpty() &FilCod = Val(SubStr(&PadObs,1,8)) EndIf Do 'GetFilial' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ WCwcManifestacaoCTe.Object = wcManifestacaoCTe.Create(&FilCod, &ManRaz, &ManDtaIni, &ManDtaFin) RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &SdtConfiguracoesPasta) &ManDtaFin = serverdate() &ManDtaIni = &ManDtaFin.AddDays(-30) Grid.Rows = 15 &ManTip = 3 EndEvent Event Refresh Do 'GetFilial' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. ManNro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ManTip.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ManSitNFe.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ManSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount EndEvent Event Grid.Load &IsTemXml = prcVerificaTemXmlManifestacao.udp(EmpCod, ManCod) &PesCnpj = ManCpfCnpj &FormatadoPesCnpj = ManCpfCnpj RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&PesCnpj, &PesCnpj) if not &FormatadoPesCnpj.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&FormatadoPesCnpj, &Erro, 'N') EndIF &NfeEmpCod = EmpCod do 'getFornecedor' &NfeNum = ManNro &varManCod = trim(str(ManModCod)) &Nfeser = trim(str(ManSer)) VerificaNotaJahLancada.Call(EmpCod, ManFilCod, Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS, &NfeCliCod, &NfeNum, &Nfeser, &varManCod, 0, &NfeCod ) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &groupaction.Clear() &groupaction.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &groupaction.AddItem(1, 'Manifestar') &groupaction.AddItem(2, 'Consultar NFe') If (&IsTemXml = false) &groupaction.AddItem(3, 'Download XML') Endif If (&IsTemXml = true) &groupaction.AddItem(4, 'Imprimir NFe') Endif If (&IsTemXml = true) &groupaction.AddItem(5, 'Exporta Xml') Endif &groupaction.AddItem(6, 'Chave da Nota') If (&AutNivEXCLUIRMANIFESTACAO > 0) &groupaction.AddItem(7, 'Excluir registro') Endif ManNro.ColumnClass = iif(&NfeCod > 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Do Case Case ManTip = EntradaSaida.Entrada ManTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case ManTip = EntradaSaida.Saida ManTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise ManTip.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case ManSitNFe = Situacao_Nfe.AUTORIZADO ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case ManSitNFe = Situacao_Nfe.DENEGADA ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case ManSitNFe = Situacao_Nfe.CANCELADA ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise ManSitNFe.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case ManSts = Status_DFe.NaoManifestado ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.Confirmacao ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.Desconhecido ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.Ciencia ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case ManSts = Status_DFe.NaoRealizada ManSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise ManSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase &ManCodWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &ManCodWithTags = trim(ManCod.ToFormattedString()) If &IsTemXml = false &ManCodWithTags = format(!"", "Sem Xml") + &ManCodWithTags EndIf If &IsTemXml = true &ManCodWithTags = format(!"", "Com Xml") + &ManCodWithTags EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &groupaction.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &groupaction = 1 Do 'Do Manifestar' Case &groupaction = 2 Do 'Do ConsultaSefaz' Case &groupaction = 3 Do 'Do SincronizarIndividual' Case &groupaction = 4 Do 'Do GeraNota' Case &groupaction = 5 Do 'Do ExportarXml' Case &groupaction = 6 Do 'Do Chave' Case &groupaction = 7 Do 'Do ExcluirRegistro' EndCase &groupaction = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirRegistro.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirRegistro.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action ExcluirRegistro' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Doaction' wpConf03.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSincronizar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Sincronizar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Sincronizar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcManifestacaoDestinatario.Create(&EmpCod, &FilCod, 'NFE') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Sincronizar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSincronizarCte' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ SincronizarCte_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event SincronizarCte_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcManifestacaoDestinatario.Create(&EmpCod, &FilCod, 'CTE') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event SincronizarCte_Modal.Close do 'CarregaCTe' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?e2b76e6b-4b9a-40a0-8dff-65b6c832b5ef' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do Manifestar' WPManifestar.Popup(&EmpCod,ManFilCod,ManCha,ManNsu,ManCpfCnpj,ManRaz,ManCod) refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultaSefaz' If not ManCha.Trim().IsEmpty() GravaConsultaSEFAZ.Call('WWMANIFESTACAO', EmpCod, ManFilCod, ManCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaSefazNota.Link('WWMANIFESTACAO', EmpCod, ManFilCod, ManCod, &SolCod) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SincronizarIndividual' &IsExisteXml = false if not ManCha.IsEmpty() GravaXmlNota.Call(EmpCod, ManCha, ManNsu, &SdtConfiguracoesPasta, &IsExisteXml) endif if &IsExisteXml = false GeraXmlSincroManifestIndividual.Call(EmpCod,ManFilCod,'S',ManCod,ManCha,&SolCod) Tablepercent.Visible = true tbResult.Visible = false &Random = random()* 10 &ProgressId = 'SincroDFe' + trim(Str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) + trim(str(&Random)) &ProgressId = &ProgressId.trim() scaProgressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId scaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) scaProgressBar1.Start() RecepcaoDFe.Submit('RecepcaoDFe', &ProgressId, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &FilCod, &SolCod) txtMsg.Caption = '' Else Refresh Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GeraNota' GeraPdfDanfe_Manifestacao.Call(EmpCod, ManFilCod, ManCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportarXml' If &IsTemXml = true &NomArq = &SdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+ trim(ManCha)+'.xml' &file.Source = &NomArq If &file.Exists() &file.Delete() EndIf &ManXmlNfe = retornaXmlManifestacao.Udp(EmpCod, ManCod) &ResultadoAbertura = DfwOpen(&NomArq,'','', 0, 'ISO-8859-1') &ResultadoNext = dfwptxt(&ManXmlNfe) // Grava Linha &ResultadoNext = DFWNext() &ResultadoAbertura = dfwclose() &link = &SdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+ trim(ManCha)+'.xml' link(&link) Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Arquivo Xml vazio contate o suporte.') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Chave' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ChaveNfe.PopUp(ManCha) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirRegistro' &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &ManCod_Selected = ManCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirRegistro.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action ExcluirRegistro' prcAtualizaManifestacaoExcluido.Call(&EmpCod_Selected, &ManCod_Selected) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event gxUITabsPanel_Tabss.TabChanged do 'CarregaCTe' EndEvent Event &ManRaz.ControlValueChanging(&ManRaz) do 'CarregaCTe' EndEvent Event &ManDtaFin.ControlValueChanged do 'CarregaCTe' EndEvent Event &ManDtaIni.ControlValueChanged do 'CarregaCTe' EndEvent Event &FilCod.ControlValueChanged do 'CarregaCTe' EndEvent Event scaProgressBar1.OnComplete For Each Order ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressId &IsPodeTransmitir = True Tablepercent.Visible = False tbResult.Visible = True txtMsg.ForeColor = RGB(210,130,0) txtMsg.Caption = ProgressLogXml.Trim() do 'CarregaCTe' grid.Refresh() prcExecutaCiencia.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &IsCiencia) prcPegaArquivosDownloadDFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod) btnSincronizar.Enabled = 1 btnSincronizarCte.Enabled = 1 Exit EndFor Do 'GetFilial' Tablepercent.Visible = False tbResult.Visible = true EndEvent Event &FilCod.IsValid &PadObs = &FilCod.ToFormattedString() PadraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) Do 'GetFilial' RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &SdtConfiguracoesPasta) EndEvent Sub 'CarregaCTe' &PaginaAtiva = gxUITabsPanel_Tabss.ActivePage if &PaginaAtiva = 2 btnSincronizar.Visible = 0 btnSincronizarCte.Visible = 1 WCwcManifestacaoCTe.Object = wcManifestacaoCTe.Create(&FilCod, &ManRaz, &ManDtaIni, &ManDtaFin) Else btnSincronizar.Visible = 1 btnSincronizarCte.Visible = 0 //NFe Endif EndSub Sub 'getFornecedor' &NfeCliCod.SetEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &NfeEmpCod Where PesCnpj = &PesCnpj or PesCnpj = &FormatadoPesCnpj //when &PesCpf.IsEmpty() //Where PesCpf = &PesCpf or PesCpf = &FormatadoPesCpf when &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCod = PesCod Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetFilial' For each order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod txtSincronizacao.Caption = 'Sync: ' + trim(toformattedString(FilUltSin)) + '[NFe] NSU:' + trim(str(FilUltNSU)) + ' de ' + trim(str(FilMaxNSU)) txtSincronizacaoCte.Caption = '[CTe] NSU:' + trim(str(FilUltNSUCte)) + ' de ' + trim(str(FilMaxNSUCte)) Exit EndFor EndSub
